display.name: Flexi - alien fish pond
display.author: Flexi
display.blurb: Translucent creatures drift through a glowing aquarium current.

annotation.technical_notes: An organic reaction-diffusion simulation generates self-replicating, cell-like structures with dark, slit-like nuclei. A per-pixel warp shader combined with feedback through sampler_main drives the fluid, biological drift, while the entire system undergoes a slow hue cycle. The expansion and pulsation of the cell membranes are modulated dynamically by the bass and mid-range frequencies of the audio.
